div.head: 137. Memorandum From the Assistant Secretary of State for Far Eastern Affairs (Hilsman) to the Deputy Director of the Office of Southeast Asian Affairs (Hannah)Source: Department of State, EA/Burma Union–Cambodia Files: Lot 66 D 492, 1963 Cambodia, July thru Dec. Confidential. Also sent to Czyzak of L/FE.
div.p: In a conversation between Acheson, Harriman, Hilsman and Forrestal today, it was agreed that, to provide a basis for considering whether or not Acheson should make a trip to Cambodia, we would draft a treaty on Cambodia’s neutrality, including an enlarged ICC along the lines Sihanouk desires, which we would be content to sign if it could be negotiated without a conference.
